default_branch.description: Default branch name for new clones

taps.description: Registered taps keyed by alias name

url.description: Git URL or local path for this tap

provider.description: Git hosting provider (e.g. github, gitlab, bitbucket)

work_mode.description: DEPRECATED: moved to work-state.json (~/.local/state/dots/work.yaml). Kept here for backwards compatibility; auto-migrated on first work on/off invocation.

aliases.description: Custom path aliases (e.g. @nvim -> @config/nvim). Values may reference other aliases, including any builtin from the default family (@home, @config, @data, @cache, @state, @bin), the XDG family (@xdg-config, @xdg-data, @xdg-cache, @xdg-state), or the Apple family (@apple-config, @apple-data, @apple-cache, @apple-logs, @apple-launchagents).

platform.description: Platform-specific core setting overrides keyed by OS or OS-arch

conflict_strategy.description: How to handle file conflicts during installation

backup.description: Whether to backup existing files before overwriting

link_strategy.description: Default link strategy for package installation
